name: BCP Investment Corp
business: BCP Investment Corporation is an externally managed, non-diversified closed-end investment company that has elected to be regulated as a business development company (BDC). It originates, structures, and invests in secured term loans, bonds or notes and mezzanine debt primarily in privately-held middle market companies. The company's investment objective is to generate current income and, to a lesser extent, capital appreciation from investments in senior secured term loans, mezzanine debt and selected equity investments.
